name: bottom bunk
hints: You wake up in the bottom bunk of the ship's cabin. Look around carefully before getting up.
There's something hidden under the mattress. Try MOVE MATTRESS or FEEL around.
MOVE MATTRESS finds a hidden item underneath. FEEL confirms the mattress is soft. GET UP to leave the bunk and enter the cabin.
Do MOVE MATTRESS first to find a hidden item, then GET UP to proceed to the ship's cabin (room 2).
notes: Starting room. MOVE MATTRESS finds a hidden item before you GET UP. This is the first puzzle - always search your surroundings before moving on. GET UP takes you to the ship's cabin (room 2).
